pages.text: Grants consumer:$(br)$(li)30-second Herbivore$(li)30-minute Eternity$(li)5-minute Nourishment$(li)2-minute Spell Mastery$(br)Can be consumed regardless of satiation. Eternity duration stacks. Consuming during Herbivore effect increases Herbivore level by 1 and doubles duration (max level 4, max duration 10 minutes).
